text: I feel struck by a sense of quiet potential, as if standing at the threshold of invention. In the hallway, the sharp geometry and cleanliness evoke anticipation, almost as if the blank spaces wait to be filled with ideas or discoveries. Moving into the vibrant R+D exhibit, the colors and words stimulate my thoughts—a celebration of human curiosity and our restless desire to understand and shape the world. Being here feels like I am both observer and participant in the perpetual unfolding of knowledge.
